name: Fetch Artifact
description: Copy an artifact file from the host artifacts directory into the sandbox execution environment. Use this to bring images, PDFs, or other binary files into the sandbox for inspection or processing. Works across Docker sandbox, SSH remote, tunnel, and local backends.

function.name: fetch_artifact
function.description: Copy an artifact file from the host artifacts directory into the sandbox execution environment. Use this to bring images, PDFs, or other binary files into the sandbox for inspection or processing. Works across Docker sandbox, SSH remote, tunnel, and local backends.

filename.description: The name of the artifact to fetch (e.g. 'chart.png', 'report.pdf'). Must not contain path separators.

dest_path.description: Optional destination path in the sandbox execution environment. Defaults to /workspace/<filename>.
